utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So it said that by the year 2030 , there will be computers that can carry out the same number of functions as an actual human brain .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So theoretically we could download our thoughts and our memories into this computer ...

utterances.speaker: Janine
utterances.text: ... and live forever as a machine !

emotion_cause.span: 3_... and live forever as a machine !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That is so Janine , you ... you ... you know what , do you know we are doing right now ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You and I , we are interfacing .
